title: Delicate Syrian Lamb Tagine
description: A savory and light Syrian dish featuring shredded coconut and double-rise-bread, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and paleo-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, then remove from the tagine.
Add the chopped onion to the tagine and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cubed double-rise-bread to the tagine and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the shredded coconut to the tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Return the lamb shoulder to the tagine and cover with a lid.
Transfer the tagine to the preheated oven and cook for 2.5 hours.
